channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Big bushes blocking pathways needs trimming, 8th July
item.description:
Ther are few bushes which are overgrown and blocking pathway walking. This issues was reported few times but no action nwasntaken

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dunkery Road, Mottingham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 8th July
item.description:
Same location as usual by the same tenants from the same HMO, clearing out their bins, because presumably the bin facilities aren’t adequate enough for all the sub tenants now living there ?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Talbot Road, West Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Over growing brambles from Falconwood train station, 7th July
item.description:
There are many many over grown brambles protuding through the fence from Falconwoos train station onto the access road to houses above the the shops at Lingfield crescent
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 3, Lingfield Crescent, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: In the middle of the road near manhole cover, opposite 87B College Place NW10DR, 7th July
item.description:
Very deep pothole, has been there for a few months now and seems to be getting worse with loose gravel. Cars going up and down the street having to avoid that part of the road otherwise will damage their wheels.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): College Place, Kentish Town, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Youths are causing a vandalism problem. They are throwing rubbish from the bin onto the roag and breaking bottles onto the street. This bin needs to be removed. Its veen there a couple of weeks and the problem has started. Residents have been clearing the litter butbits now a health and safety issue. The bin has been emptied today and already there's glass thrown on the street. The planters next to the bin needs plants in them to stop youths fathering there and drinking., 7th July
item.description:
This is a big problem. There's glass and litter thrown from the bin and planters daily. Youths are gathering in the area from 7.30pm onwards and drinking then vandalism occurs and the bin/litter gets thrown into the street. Health and safely risk.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Beechwood Crescent, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Where Brooke street meets Brooke square / Brooke market, 7th July
item.description:
The metal bollard has been damaged by a vehicle and it has bent and blocks the pavement
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 14, Gray's Inn Road, Holborn, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Stop Line Faded, 7th July
item.description:
Stop line faded at traffic lights
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 12-24, Westbury Avenue, Harringay, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Huge pothole, 7th July
item.description:
There is a huge pothole when you exit the M11 slip road going onto the M25 this has caused my tyre to burst on my way home from work at 23:30

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): M25, Epping Forest
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lamppost in Brooke square next to the Mulaney construction box, 7th July
item.description:
This street light has been shining into my room for the last 3+ months. I think when they cut down the trees it must have fallen on the light and altered the angle as it now shines directly into my window and disturbs my sleep as it’s not angled correctly and too bright

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brooke's Market, Holborn, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Proper cleaning required to communal area and stairs, 7th July
item.description:
Proper and thorough cleaning/mopping is required in the communal area and stairs at flats 9-16Rudbeck House SE15. The stains are few months old now, they are on stairs( different parts of stairs) and have been overlooked. The whole area needs thorough scrub to remove all the unsightly stains. Please assist. Thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large amount of Garden waste, 7th July
item.description:
There is a large amount of Garden waste. It was dumped by someone driving a van . Its blocking the pavement.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Penford Street, Loughborough Junction, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead trees, 7th July
item.description:
All the trees in this street are dead
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Arbutus Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish has not been collected in weeks, 7th July
item.description:
Rubbish has not been collected in weeks

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kingsland Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: There is lots of litter in the floor and the non-recycled rubbish has not been collected, 7th July
item.description:
There is a lot of litter on the floor, and the non-recycled rubbish has not been collected In 1 Dunston road in over 3 weeks so the smell is really bad

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kingsland Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Van appears abandoned parked in Dellfield Close, 7th July
item.description:
This van has been left parked on a narrow cul-de-sac road for around 2 months. It is unsightly with an accumulation of rubbish inside and is not owned by any residents. It is also illegally parked given it has no current MOT ( already reported to authorities).

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dellfield Close, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter picking and sweeping required, 7th July
item.description:
Lots of rubbish near the curb on Radnor rd, Se15 on the stretch from Freda Corbet, Sister Mabel's and towards the junction with Commercial Way. This hasn't been swept for a long time. Please assist. Thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 36, Radnor Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Chairs on pavement, 7th July
item.description:
Chairs on pavement
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Warwick Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Growing pile of rubbish, 7th July
item.description:
Second day reported in a row. We need our bin back. We need this rubbish collected. This is a serious health issue

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Llanover Road, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Too many lime bikes spilling over onto rest of the road, 7th July
item.description:
This is the busiest part of Balmes Road and these Lime bikes have not been moved even after informing lime several hours ago. There are more parked since and they are on either side of this busy junction. Cars are having reverse and forth to make the tight turn make worse by the bikes. This is not a suitable place to site a bike parking bay. It would be much better to move it further down the road and make a bigger parking site.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 18, Southgate Road, Hoxton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on wall next to bus stop at start of Anerley Park, 7th July
item.description:
Graffiti on the wall nearby the bus stop at the start of Anerley Park. Please can this be removed. Thank you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 107-111, Anerley Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
